## Summary

Describe the user-visible behavior and why this is the minimum sufficient change.

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run check`
- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] Relevant negative or regression coverage was added

## Safety

- [ ] No credentials or secret-file contents are included
- [ ] No protected tests, assertions, or fixtures were weakened
- [ ] Scope, dependency, and protocol changes are called out explicitly
